title: Linear search returns valid index or -1
description: find_first returns an index in [-1, lst.length-1].
prompt: Write a Kodo module with a find_first(lst: List<Int>, target: Int) -> Int function that ensures result >= -1. Return index of first occurrence or -1 if not found. Print find_first([3,1,4,1,5], 1) and find_first([1,2,3], 9).
